# Generate Implementation Plan

Transform the provided notes into a structured implementation plan.

## Structure Output As

# Implementation Plan

## Overview

## Architecture Notes

## Components Affected

## Step-by-Step Plan

## Instructions

- Infer missing section placement logically.
- Organize technical details into implementation-ready structure.
- Preserve all engineering-specific details.
- Make the result practical for development execution.
- Return markdown only.
